Caption: Progress of Jayden’s walking from the 6 weeks he was in the hospital! The OT’s have done a phenomenal job with him. Jayden looked hunched over in a lot of these videos as his long abdomen scar was quite tight. As he stood, walked, and stretched more, the scar has loosened and he can now stand completely straight. It’s still tight and he can’t bend backwards at all, but he’s not hunched over anymore. He no longer has pain when he walks. His left arm is also gaining more and more movement.  A lot of these videos are just the highlights from his exercises. There were times he would yell out in pain, times of exhaustion, and struggle. His journey was not easy, but he got through it. He is so tough!  Again Jayden is ok with these being posted, and these nurses have also given consent to be posted. #hospital #motorcycle #accident #brother #pt
